creator: dom@happygiraffe.net
text:
This brings Template Toolkit up to the latest version.  There are a
couple of notes:

* This version should work under 4.x again, as it no longer relies on
  perl 5.6.0 specific functions.

* This version uses a C based utility to speed things up.  This means
  that it has changed to the architecture-dependant directory.  You
  should fully delete your previous version before installing this one to
  avoid multiple versions in your PERLLIB.

Fix: Here's the patch.
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
